title: Google's new Gemini API Agent Skill patches the knowledge gap AI models have with their own SDKs
what_happened: AI models don't know about their own updates after training. Google's new "Agent Skill" shows how a simple fix can dramatically improve coding results. The article Google's new Gemini API Agent Skill patches the knowledge gap AI models have with their own SDKs appeared first on The Decoder.
primary_risk: Debugging complexity and cascading failures in agentic systems.
primary_opportunity: End-to-end automation of complex cognitive workflows.
technical_angle: Agent orchestration is emerging as a new software abstraction layer.

title: Anthropic's new data shows AI skill builds over time, and that could widen the inequality gap
what_happened: Anthropic's second Economic Index tracks how Claude usage is evolving across the economy. One key finding: the longer people use the AI model, the better their results get. That could widen existing inequalities. The article Anthropic's new data shows AI skill builds over time, and that could widen the inequality gap appeared first on The Deco
primary_risk: Marginal performance gains may not justify integration effort.
primary_opportunity: Practical improvements when layered onto existing AI workflows.
technical_angle: Signals incremental evolution rather than a paradigm shift in current AI systems.
